testcase.name: search_byDescriptionKeyword_returnsMatchingRecipes
testcase.system-out:

'org.springframework.jdbc.datasource.embedded.EmbeddedDatabaseFactory$EmbeddedDataSourceProxy@3e6748ae'] Database driver: undefined/unknown Database version: 2.3.232 Autocommit mode: undefined/unknown Isolation level: undefined/unknown Minimum pool size: undefined/unknown Maximum pool size: undefined/unknown 2026-04-24T16:26:30.206+02:00 INFO 75345 --- [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists ingredients cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists recipe_flavor_tags cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists recipe_steps cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists recipes cascade Hibernate: create table ingredients (quantity numeric(10,2), sort_order integer not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, recipe_id bigint not null, name varchar(255) not null, unit varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table recipe_flavor_tags (recipe_id bigint not null, flavor_tag enum ('BITTER','MILD','SALTY','SOUR','SPICY','SWEET','UMAMI')) Hibernate: create table recipe_steps (step_number integer not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, recipe_id bigint not null, instruction TEXT not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table recipes (cook_time_minutes integer, prep_time_minutes integer, servings integer, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), cuisine varchar(255), description TEXT, image_filename varchar(255), title varchar(255) not null, category enum ('DESSERT','DRIKKE','FORRETT','HOVEDRETT','SNACK') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists ingredients add constraint FK7p08vcn6wf7fd6qp79yy2jrwg foreign key (recipe_id) references recipes Hibernate: alter table if exists recipe_flavor_tags add constraint FKf29v5tgsck3v4qopckjwexqxs foreign key (recipe_id) references recipes Hibernate: alter table if exists recipe_steps add constraint FKof4i3g3aiwgro5ykaf1j28iw1 foreign key (recipe_id) references recipes 2026-04-24T16:26:30.223+02:00 INFO 75345 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-04-24T16:26:30.334+02:00 INFO 75345 --- [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-04-24T16:26:30.504+02:00 INFO 75345 --- [ main] n.s.k.repository.RecipeRepositoryTest : Started RecipeRepositoryTest in 1.166 seconds (process running for 1.542) Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at lower(r1_0.title) like ? escape '' or lower(r1_0.description) like ? escape ''

testcase.name: search_byFlavorTag_returnsMatchingRecipes
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipe_flavor_tags (recipe_id,flavor_tag) values (?,?) Hibernate: select distinct r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 join recipe_flavor_tags ft1_0 on r1_0.id=ft1_0.recipe_id where ft1_0.flavor_tag in (?)

testcase.name: search_byCategory_returnsMatchingRecipes
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 where r1_0.category=?

testcase.name: search_combinedFilters_returnsNarrowedResults
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 where r1_0.category=? and lower(r1_0.cuisine)=?

testcase.name: search_byCuisine_isCaseInsensitive
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 where lower(r1_0.cuisine)=?

testcase.name: findDistinctCuisines_returnsAllUniqueCuisines
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select distinct r1_0.cuisine from recipes r1_0 where r1_0.cuisine is not null order by r1_0.cuisine

testcase.name: search_byCuisine_returnsMatchingRecipes
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 where lower(r1_0.cuisine)=?

Hibernate: select distinct r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 join ingredients i1_0 on r1_0.id=i1_0.recipe_id where lower(i1_0.name) like ? escape ''

testcase.name: search_byTitleKeyword_returnsMatchingRecipes
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into ingredients (name,quantity,recipe_id,sort_order,unit,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into recipes (category,cook_time_minutes,created_at,cuisine,description,image_filename,prep_time_minutes,servings,title,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 where lower(r1_0.title) like ? escape '' or lower(r1_0.description) like ? escape ''

Hibernate: insert into recipe_flavor_tags (recipe_id,flavor_tag) values (?,?) Hibernate: insert into recipe_flavor_tags (recipe_id,flavor_tag) values (?,?) Hibernate: insert into recipe_flavor_tags (recipe_id,flavor_tag) values (?,?) Hibernate: insert into recipe_flavor_tags (recipe_id,flavor_tag) values (?,?) Hibernate: select distinct r1_0.id,r1_0.category,r1_0.cook_time_minutes,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.cuisine,r1_0.description,r1_0.image_filename,r1_0.prep_time_minutes,r1_0.servings,r1_0.title,r1_0.updated_at from recipes r1_0 join ingredients i1_0 on r1_0.id=i1_0.recipe_id where lower(i1_0.name) like ? escape ''
